changelog: Major hardening for the request modal. Library decoration is now decoupled from the search loop, capped at 4 concurrent lookups, and force-times-out at 6 seconds so it can never hang. TMDB results capped at 12 (was 20) to halve memory pressure on TV boxes. Crashes are now dumped to a local file at /Android/data/com.hushtv.tv/files/crash.log so we can diagnose any future issue.
